description: The practice 'Cabinet Médical DrTux' has moved. Update the 'Header_Standard' prescription header template in MedinTux to reflect the new location. Replace the old address (12 Rue de l'Ancienne Poste, 69000 Lyon, Tel: 04 72 00 00 00) with the new address: 50 Avenue de la Nouvelle Santé, 75000 Paris, Tel: 01 23 45 67 89. Save the changes to the template.
